01 — Who I Am

About Me

I'm a final-year Computer Science & Engineering student at the American International University-Bangladesh (AIUB), graduating in 2026. My academic journey has taken me from writing my first lines of code to publishing research at an IEEE-sponsored international conference.

I work at the intersection of Software Engineering, Machine Learning, and Quality Assurance — areas where rigorous thinking and practical execution both matter. I care about building things that work reliably in the real world, not just in controlled settings.

When I'm not coding, I'm reading about AI ethics, contributing to community health awareness initiatives, and looking for the next interesting problem to solve.

03 — What I Built

Featured Projects

📚
Online Library System

A full-featured web-based library management platform with secure authentication, book inventory tracking, borrowing workflows, and administrative dashboards. Designed with a clean UI for both librarians and patrons.

C# HTML/CSS SQL ASP.NET
View on GitHub →
🎵
Vibe Cloud

A cloud-based music streaming platform engineered using Node.js and MySQL with AWS infrastructure for scalable media delivery. Built with Agile sprints, covering CI/CD pipelines and real-time audio playback.

Node.js MySQL AWS Agile
View on GitHub →
🔬
Science Learning Platform with AR

Designed a comprehensive Software Requirements Specification (SRS) and full UML architecture for an augmented reality science learning platform. Covers use-case diagrams, sequence diagrams, ER models, and system design.

UML SRS AR Design System Architecture
View on GitHub →
♻️
Intelligent Waste Classification

AI-driven waste classification system using MobileNetV3 and deep learning on the BDWaste dataset. Achieved state-of-the-art accuracy for sustainable urban waste management — presented at PECCII 2026 (IEEE-sponsored).

Python MobileNetV3 Deep Learning IEEE
View on GitHub →
